name: 6 Bean Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 envelopes chicken noodle soup mix, 2 ounces each
recipeInstructions:
1. For each pound of dry beans, add 10 cups hot water. Up to 2 teaspoons of salt per pound of beans may be added to help the beans absorb water more evenly.
2. Heat to boiling, let boil 2 to 3 minutes. Remove from heat, cover and set aside for at least one hour, but preferably four hours or more.
3. Always discard the soak water.
4. Drain the soaked beans.
5. Cook onion, celery, carrot, green pepper, parsley, and garlic in butter until soft.
6. Combine cooked vegetables with soup mix, 2 quarts of water, bay leaf, fines herbes, and soaked beans.
7. Simmer, covered, about 1 hour to desired tenderness.
8. Add tomato and simmer for a few more minutes.
9. Serve hot, sprinkled with Parmesan cheese.
